data.title: Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse Admits $204M Crypto Super PAC Wouldn't Exist If Gary Gensler Wasn't The SEC Chair
data.description: Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse said on Sunday that the establishment of Fairshake, a cryptocurrency-focused super political action committee, was a direct response to the SEC’s approach toward the industry under Gary Gensler.

data.title: Google Sues Federal Agency For Supervising Payments App That No Longer Exists
data.description: The Consumer Financial Protection Bureau has ordered federal supervision of Alphabet Inc.'s  Google Payment Corp on Friday, Dec. 6, 2024.

data.title: PEPE Surges 27% Over The Week Powered By Crypto Exchange Listings As Dogecoin, Shiba Inu Get Left Behind
data.description: Frog-themed cryptocurrency Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE) was one of the most successful meme coins over the last week, outperforming the more names in the field.

data.title: Tesla Stock Hits $400 In Overnight Trading On Robinhood Amid Analyst Upgrades And FSD Optimism
data.description: Tesla Inc. shares surged past $400 in overnight trading, reaching $401.16 as of 12:11 am EST Monday in New York, approaching its all-time high of $407.36 set in November 2021.

data.title: Elon Musk Asks 'Was It Ever Not A Lie' As OpenAI Plans To Drop AGI Clause In Microsoft Deal
data.description: Elon Musk has accused OpenAI of betraying its founding mission and criticized discussions to potentially remove restrictions limiting Microsoft's access to its advanced AI technology, raising concerns about the organization's shift toward for-profit operations.
